title: Food Delivery App 外卖APP点餐
scene: 通过外卖平台点餐并与骑手沟通

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: Hello, I just ordered food from your app. How long will it take?
lines.trans: 你好，我刚在你们APP上点了外卖。大概多久能送到？

lines.speaker: Rider
lines.line: Hi, I am your delivery driver. It should arrive in about twenty minutes.
lines.trans: 您好，我是您的骑手。大概二十分钟左右送到。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: Please put it at the front desk. I am in a meeting right now.
lines.trans: 请放在前台就好。我现在正在开会。

lines.speaker: Rider
lines.line: Got it. By the way, the soup may be a little warm. Please be careful.
lines.trans: 好的。顺便说一下，汤可能有点烫，请小心。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: Thanks for the reminder. I will ask my colleague to get it.
lines.trans: 谢谢提醒。我会让同事去取。

lines.speaker: Rider
lines.line: I have arrived. The front desk said they will take it upstairs.
lines.trans: 我到了。前台说他们会送上楼。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: Perfect. I will check it soon. Did you bring chopsticks and napkins?
lines.trans: 太好了。我一会儿就去看。你带了筷子和纸巾吗？

lines.speaker: Rider
lines.line: Yes, they are inside the bag. Please leave a good review if you can.
lines.trans: 带了，都在袋子里。如果可以的话，请给个好评。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: Of course. The food looks great. Thank you!
lines.trans: 一定。食物看起来不错。谢谢你！
